today_in_history_posts.title: RFC: Deterministic Entropy From BIP32 Keychains
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- The proposal introduces a method for deterministic keychain creation from initial entropy.
- It utilizes HMAC-SHA512 for entropy calculation, compatible with various BIP models.
- Aiming to simplify backups, it is in the proposal stage without current comments.

today_in_history_posts.title: Difference between ignoring htlc request due to wrong payment hash vs refusing to release preimage in LND
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- Subhra Mazumdar experimented with LND, establishing a channel between two parties, A and B.
- An error occurred when sending a payment to B, indicating "incorrect or unknown payment details."- Subhra inquires about mimicking a griefing attack in LND, where B refuses to release the correct preimage.

today_in_history_posts.title: Unilateral Exit
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- Implementing shared non-custodial UTXOs requires methods for participants to exit without others' consent.
- The use of Merkle trees and cryptographic accumulators is proposed to enable efficient unilateral exits.
- A novel opcode, `OP_EXIT`, leveraging accumulators, facilitates dynamic updates of shared UTXOs for efficient exits.
